PreToolUse.command: bash -c "if echo \"$TOOL_INPUT\" | grep -qE '\.env|wrangler\.toml|secrets'; then echo 'BLOCK: This file may contain secrets. Edit manually.'; exit 2; fi"

PostToolUse.command: bash -c "if echo \"$TOOL_INPUT\" | grep -qE 'css/src\.css|tailwind\.config'; then cd C:/Users/wowoh/wowohcool.com && npx tailwindcss -i ./css/src.css -o ./css/styles.css --minify 2>/dev/null; fi"
